basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Deepak Raghavan Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details and any applicable relaxations.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's (4 years) and Master's (ME or M.Tech) with 75% or above in both UG & PG, in following streams only: Mechanical Engg., Production Engg., Applied Mechanics, Instrumentation Engg., Applied Phys., or related. Experience in SLA 3D printing or photolithography/cleanroom. Valid GATE score must for ME/M.Tech. degree holders. Alternatively, B.Tech. from NITs/IITs with CGPA 8.5 or above in any of the above disciplines
qualification.details: Bachelor's (4 years) and Master's (ME or M.Tech) with 75% or above in both UG & PG, in following streams only: Mechanical Engg., Production Engg., Applied Mechanics, Instrumentation Engg., Applied Phys., or related. Experience in SLA 3D printing or photolithography/cleanroom. Valid GATE score must for ME/M.Tech. degree holders. Alternatively, B.Tech. from NITs/IITs with CGPA 8.5 or above in any of the above disciplines.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Deepak Raghavan Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Delhi Deepak Raghavan Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Deepak Raghavan Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your completed application via email is 22nd June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor's (4 years) and Master's (ME or M.Tech) degree with at least 75% marks in relevant engineering or applied science disciplines. A B.Tech from NITs/IITs with a CGPA of 8.5 or above is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, the official notification indicates that there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Deepak Raghavan Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated monthly salary ranging from Rs. 41,000 to Rs. 50,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Deepak Raghavan Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two main stages: initial shortlisting of eligible candidates, followed by an online interview for the shortlisted applicants.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the Deepak Raghavan Research Fellow position must be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application and required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q7. Does IIT Delhi require a GATE score for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, a valid GATE score is mandatory for candidates applying with an ME or M.Tech degree. This is a crucial requirement for eligibility.

faq.question: Q8. What specific experience is preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Preference will be given to candidates who have experience in SLA 3D printing or working in a photolithography/cleanroom environment.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this Deepak Raghavan Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The position of Deepak Raghavan Research Fellow at IIT Delhi is a contractual role, meaning it is offered for a specific period as per the project requirements.
